tasks.label: 00 Status prüfen
tasks.command: echo USER=$(whoami) && pwd && git status && git branch --show-current && git remote -v

tasks.label: Claude Code starten
tasks.command: echo USER=$(whoami) && pwd && git status && git branch --show-current && claude

tasks.label: Codex starten
tasks.command: echo USER=$(whoami) && pwd && git status && git branch --show-current && codex

tasks.label: Git Diff prüfen
tasks.command: git status && git diff --stat && git diff --check
